text:
>
 >>Submitter-Id:   current-users
 >>Originator:     Josh Tiefenbach
 >>Organization:   Connective Software
 >>Confidential:   no
 >>Synopsis:       Patch to sys/cam to add M_ZERO to appropriate malloc calls
 >>Severity:       non-critical
 >>Priority:       low
 >>Category:       kern
 >>Release:        FreeBSD 5.0-CURRENT i386
 >>Class:          change-request
 
 I'd rather not see this done until after the 4.2 release or -stable grows
 similar functionality.  It's just another thing that make is difficult
 to pull CAM changes back into 4-stable.
 
 --
 Justin
